member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.AuditableEntity
member.summary: Base class for entities that require audit information.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.AuditableEntity.CreatedOnUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC date and time when the entity was created.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.AuditableEntity.CreatedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the user who created the entity.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.AuditableEntity.LastModifiedOnUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC date and time when the entity was last modified.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.AuditableEntity.LastModifiedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the user who last modified the entity.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.AuditableEntity.MarkAsCreated(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Marks the entity as created.
member.param: The identifier of the creating user.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.AuditableEntity.MarkAsModified(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Marks the entity as modified.
member.param: The identifier of the modifying user.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.BaseEntity
member.summary: Represents the root entity for the domain model. Every persistent entity in the system inherits from this class.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.BaseEntity.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the entity.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.BaseEntity.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. A new Guid is generated automatically.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.BaseEntity.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether two entities are equal. Two entities are equal when they have the same Id and belong to the same concrete type.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.BaseEntity.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns the hash code for the entity.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.DomainEvent
member.summary: Represents the base class for all domain events. A domain event captures something important that has happened within the business domain.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.DomainEvent.EventId
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the event.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.DomainEvent.OccurredOnUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when the event occurred.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.DomainEvent.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new domain event.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.SoftDeleteEntity
member.summary: Base class for entities that support soft deletion. Instead of permanently removing records from the database, entities are marked as deleted and can be restored later.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.IsDeleted
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the entity has been soft deleted.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.DeletedOnUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC date and time when the entity was deleted.

member.name: P:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.DeletedBy
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the user who deleted the entity.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.MarkAsDeleted(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Marks the entity as deleted.
member.param: The identifier of the user performing the deletion.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.Restore
member.summary: Restores a previously soft-deleted entity.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants
member.summary: Contains application-wide constant values used throughout CivicHero. Avoid hard-coded strings and numbers by referencing these constants.

member.name: F:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants.AuthenticationScheme
member.summary: The default authentication scheme used by the application.

member.name: F:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants.DefaultConnection
member.summary: The default database connection string name.

member.name: F:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants.ApiVersion
member.summary: The default API version.

member.name: F:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants.DefaultPageNumber
member.summary: The default page number used for pagination.

member.name: F:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants.DefaultPageSize
member.summary: The default page size used for pagination.

member.name: F:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants.MaximumPageSize
member.summary: The maximum page size allowed for pagination.

member.name: F:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants.SupportedImageExtensions
member.summary: Supported image file extensions.

member.name: F:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Constants.AppConstants.MaximumUploadSizeBytes
member.summary: Maximum upload size (10 MB).

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException
member.summary: Represents an exception that is thrown when a business rule defined by the domain is violated.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified error message.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Exceptions.DomainException
member.summary: Represents a business rule or domain-specific exception.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Exceptions.DomainException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Exceptions.DomainException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Core.Exceptions.DomainException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message and inner exception.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Extensions.LoggingExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring Serilog logging.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Extensions.LoggingExtensions.AddApplicationLogging(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Configures Serilog for the application host.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Extensions.SwaggerExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring Swagger/OpenAPI.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Extensions.SwaggerExtensions.AddSwaggerDocumentation(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers Swagger/OpenAPI services.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering infrastructure services.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddInfrastructure(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers all infrastructure services required by the application.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Data.CivicDbContext
member.summary: Represents the application's primary Entity Framework Core database context. It is responsible for managing database connections, entity tracking, and executing database operations.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Data.CivicDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Data.CivicDbContext})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Database context configuration supplied by Dependency Injection.

member.name: M:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.Data.CivicDbContext.OnModelCreating(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the EF Core model. Entity configurations will be added as modules are implemented.
member.param: Model builder used to configure entity mappings.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.HealthChecks.AiHealthCheck
member.summary: Performs a health check for the AI subsystem.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Infrastructure.HealthChecks.DatabaseHealthCheck
member.summary: Checks database connectivity.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Middleware.CorrelationIdMiddleware
member.summary: Adds a Correlation ID to every request and response. The Correlation ID is also pushed into the Serilog logging context.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Middleware.GlobalExceptionMiddleware
member.summary: Handles all unhandled exceptions and converts them into standardized JSON responses.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Middleware.RateLimitingMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware executed after ASP.NET Core rate limiting. Responsible for adding project-specific behavior such as response headers and logging.

member.name: T:CivicHero.Backend.Middleware.RequestLoggingMiddleware
member.summary: Logs every incoming HTTP request and outgoing HTTP response.
